drl:
rule "R0"
when
    ( not T2(f0 <= 0.5) )
    or
    ( not T2(f0 <= 0.5) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2(-1.5, false, 4.5, true));
end
rule "R1"
salience -8
when
    ( T0(f2 >= 6.0, f2 < 11, f1 == true || f1 not in (false), $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2) and T1(f0 == "", f0 matches "t", $b1_1_0 : f0, $b1_1_1 : f0) and not T2() )
    or
    ( T0(f2 >= 6.0, f0 >= -1.0, f1 != true, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2) and T1(f0 == "", f0 matches "ezz", $b1_1_0 : f0, $b1_1_1 : f0) and not T2() )
    or
    ( T0(f2 < 0.0, f2 < 11, f1 == true || f1 not in (false), $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2) and T1(f0 == "", f0 matches "t", $b1_1_0 : f0, $b1_1_1 : f0) and not T2() )
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    T0(f2 >= 6.0, f2 < 11, f1 == true || f1 not in (false), $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f2)
    T1(f0 == "", f0 matches "t", $b2_1_0 : f0, $b2_1_1 : f0)
    T1($b2_2_0 : f0, $b2_2_1 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T2(4.0, true, $b2_0_1, false));
end
name: fz_123_4866
